name: sarthak Joshi
text: App works fine, but the chat feature sometimes lags. Hope they improve it soon.

name: Nehal Patel
text: Very easy to list my PG. Got genuine student inquiries within a day. The verification process is smooth

name: Riya Mehata
text: The map-based search is amazing! I found a room just 800m from my college. No broker, no nonsense.
